tasks.title: Build P&L tracking page on Kalshi dashboard
tasks.description: Add a P&L tab to the existing Kalshi trading dashboard (charlie's my-app). Display: daily P&L by strategy, cumulative return chart, win/loss ratio. Must pull from /api/strategies/:id/pnl endpoint.
